w:r.w:t: Prepared by Indigen Services | Confidential & Proprietary

The Cricket Association Management System is a purpose-built digital platform for NDCA, consolidating player registration, club management, selection processes, match scheduling, tournament management, news, gallery, and public engagement into one unified system hosted and maintained by Indigen Services.
All admin dashboards use a two-panel layout: a fixed left sidebar (240px) for navigation and a full-height main content area with a sticky topbar. The mobile app uses a bottom tab navigation pattern.
The NDCA public website is a content-rich, fully responsive site targeting fans, players, clubs, and media. All content is managed from the Admin Panel — no separate CMS login.
Player registrations · Club management · Live scores · Tournament results
Home | Matches | Leagues | News | Gallery | About | Privacy Policy | Contact
Hero, live matches, stats bar, news cards, events, gallery highlights, sponsors
Live scores, results, upcoming fixtures, match statistics by team and player
Tournament details, standings, fixtures, and results
Upcoming and past association events with registration
All published articles with category filters
Photo albums by event and match
Information on how clubs and players register with NDCA
Year-wise PDF downloads of NDCA annual reports
Association history, committee, affiliated clubs, stadium info
Constitution, Elections, League Rules, Hall of Fame, Stadium Seating, Star Attraction, Champions, Contact Us
The Super Admin is the NDCA management team with unrestricted access to all modules — players, clubs, matches, leagues, content, billing, and system settings.
Match result updated: NDCA vs Samata
Overview KPIs, activity feed, pending approvals
All players, add/edit/approve, search & filter, documents, deactivate
Permanent clubs, yearly renewals, club profiles, document uploads
Age-group trials, trial fee records, approve/reject, audit trail
Create matches, update live scores, match history, fixtures
Publish/unpublish articles with images and categories
Create/manage events, venue, date, registration details
Upload & organise photo albums by event or match
Add/manage YouTube links for highlights and announcements
Sponsor logos, names, website links, display order
Upload annual PDF reports with year and title
WYSIWYG editor for About, Constitution, Hall of Fame, and 5 others
Create/manage Club Admin accounts, reset passwords, deactivate
Player-wise, club-wise, selection-wise — export Excel or PDF
One-click backup, download or restore from admin panel
System config, email/SMTP settings, social media links
Club Admins log in via the mobile app using credentials issued by the Super Admin. They see and manage only their own club's data.
Club name, KPI tiles (Total Players, Pending, Matches), recent activity
Full roster list with photo, name, age group, specialty, approval status badge
Full form: Name, DOB, Aadhaar, address, parent details, cricket info, photo, documents
Upcoming and past matches for this club: opponent, date, venue, format, result
Club profile, season info, contact details
CAN: View and edit own club profile
CAN: Add new players, edit player profiles, upload documents
CAN: View player approval status from NDCA
CAN: View club match schedule and results
CANNOT: Approve own player submissions — only Super Admin can
CANNOT: Access other clubs' data, players, or financials
Players log in via the mobile app with credentials issued after approval. They can view their own profile, selection status, trial information, and club schedule.
Greeting, selection status card, next trial details, quick action buttons, latest news
Full personal profile, cricket details, uploaded documents (view only), achievements
Current status with breakdown, selection history, upcoming trial dates & venues
Club match schedule — upcoming and recent matches with results
All NDCA news, events, and announcements
CAN: View own complete profile and documents
CAN: View selection status and trial history
CAN: View upcoming trial dates, venues, and age group categories
CAN: View club match schedule and results, NDCA news and events
CANNOT: Edit any profile data — edits go through Club Admin
CANNOT: Access other players' profiles or any admin functionality
Available to anyone who downloads the app — no registration required. The primary engagement channel for fans, parents, and media.
🔴 LIVE — NDCA XI 142/4 (15.2 ov) vs Samata CC
Live score ticker, upcoming matches (3-card scroll), latest news, featured tournament
Live scores (auto-refresh), upcoming fixtures, past results with scorecards
Active tournaments, standings table, fixtures for selected tournament
Photo albums by event and match, YouTube highlights section
News, Events, Club Directory, Sponsors, Contact NDCA with Google Map
A single login screen handles both Super Admin (web) and Club Admin / Player (mobile app). The system auto-detects the role from credentials and redirects accordingly.
Admin Panel → User Management → Create Club Admin
Club Admin adds new player → fills form + uploads documents → submits to NDCA
Super Admin reviews → Approve / Reject with remarks → player notified via app
On approval: Player credentials auto-issued → player logs in → views profile + selection status
Super Admin creates match → set teams, date, venue, format → published to public website & app
Match day: Super Admin updates live scores (runs, wickets, overs) → auto-pushed to public feed
Match completed → final result saved → league standings updated automatically
Club contacts NDCA → Super Admin creates permanent club profile → documents uploaded & verified
Club Admin credentials issued → Yearly renewal: each season re-submit renewal form → approval
Admin web panel: Desktop-first; sidebar collapses to hamburger on tablet
Mobile app: React Native — native performance on Android and iOS
Tables on mobile: Convert to card-list layout with column visibility priority
Colour contrast: All text meets 4.5:1 ratio minimum
Keyboard navigation: All elements reachable via Tab; visible focus ring
Touch targets: Minimum 44x44px on all mobile UI elements
Form validation: Inline error messages next to fields, not colour-only cues
Alt text: All player photos, club logos, and gallery images include descriptive alt attributes
Subtle pulse animation on score tile
Progress bar with file name + percentage
Approval flow visibility: Players and Club Admins always see exact status (Pending / Under Review / Approved / Rejected with reason)
Age group validation: DOB-based auto-assignment of U-14, U-16, U-19, Senior — with override alert
Live score readability: Score in large, high-contrast format — optimised for quick reading on mobile
Document readability: Player documents in high-contrast, print-optimised format
Trial fee tracking: Payment status shown with receipt upload option
Session timeout: 30 minutes for Super Admin; 24 hours for Club Admin and Player apps (with biometric re-auth)
Audit trail: Super Admin sees 'last modified by' on every player record and approval action
Role confirmation: Irreversible actions (delete, archive) require confirmation dialog
Aadhaar masking: Displayed as XXXX-XXXX-3456 by default; click to reveal with audit log
Accessible from the League Management sidebar item. Full control over all tournaments.
Name, format (T20/ODI/Knockout/League), start/end date, participating clubs
Points, matches played, wins, losses, ties, NRR — auto-updates on result entry
Full fixture list and standings as PDF or Excel
News: Rich-text WYSIWYG editor, category tagging, publish/schedule/unpublish, image upload, preview before publishing
Gallery: Drag-and-drop album creation, bulk photo upload, album cover selection, reorder images, delete
YouTube: Paste video URL, set thumbnail, categorise (Highlights / Announcements / Events)
Club, Age Group, Status, Date Range
DPDP Act 2023 (India): Player Aadhaar and personal data handled with consent. Data stored in India (AWS Mumbai region). Parental consent required for players under 18.
Aadhaar Handling: Displayed masked by default. Full number stored encrypted. Access logged per UIDAI guidelines.
Audit Logs: Every admin action on player data is logged automatically — user, timestamp, action, affected record ID. Immutable, stored separately.
Data Backup: Daily automated backup to AWS S3. One-click manual backup. Retention: 90 days rolling.
HTTPS/SSL: All API endpoints over HTTPS. Mandatory for Play Store and App Store publishing.
Mobile app screens — Club Admin, Player, Public (React Native)
API integration for all UI data endpoints
Initial release — full visual wireframes, all 11 sections
Cricket Association Management System | UI/UX Wireframe Document v1.0
Prepared by Indigen Services | Confidential & Proprietary
